ogTitle: Paddys Flat vs Paddys River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paddys Flat and Paddys River.
heading: Paddys Flat vs Paddys River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddys Flat, New South Wales and Paddys River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paddys Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Paddys River (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddys Flat or Paddys River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddys Flat has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Paddys River scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddys Flat scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Paddys River scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddys Flat or Paddys River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paddys Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
